headline: SLG Q1 FFO Lags Despite Revenue Beat, Leasing Sets Record
summary: SLG's Q1 2026 FFO misses estimates despite a revenue beat and record Manhattan leasing. Shares slide more than 2% after hours.

raw.headline: SLG Q1 FFO Lags Despite Revenue Beat, Leasing Sets Record
raw.summary: SLG's Q1 2026 FFO misses estimates despite a revenue beat and record Manhattan leasing. Shares slide more than 2% after hours.

headline: BXP Reports Strong Leasing Momentum Led by Premier Office Demand
summary: BXP lands 200K+ square feet in San Francisco leases, filling 50 Hawthorne and pushing 680 Folsom past 90% as tech and AI demand fuels premium office growth.

raw.headline: BXP Reports Strong Leasing Momentum Led by Premier Office Demand
